title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: A JWT is issued using RS256 algorithm with an expiration time of 6 hours, and a cookie is set with a max-age value that is not 6 hours.
coverage_items: NoJWT--issueJWT[JWT is issued]/Issue JWT with RS256, set expiration to 6h, set cookie max-age to differing value-->JWTIssued

title: EP: Invalid cookie max-age equals JWT expiresIn
precondition: System allows configuration of cookie max-age.
test_steps:
Set cookie max-age to 21600 seconds (6 hours) in system configuration.
Trigger JWT issuance.
Check the Set-Cookie header max-age; verify it is not 21600 or that the system overrides it.
expected_result: Cookie max-age is different from 21600 seconds (e.g., overwritten to a different value).

title: EP: Valid cookie max-age differs from JWT expiresIn
test_steps:
Trigger JWT issuance.
Inspect the HTTP response for Set-Cookie header.
Parse the max-age attribute (in seconds).
Verify that max-age value is not equal to 21600 (6h).
expected_result: Cookie max-age is set to a value different from 21600 seconds.

title: EP: Invalid expiration (1 hour instead of 6h)
test_steps:
Set system configuration for JWT expiresIn to 1 hour.
Attempt to issue JWT.
If JWT is issued, verify expiration time is still 6 hours or issuance fails.
expected_result: JWT is not issued or still has 6h expiration despite configuration.

title: EP: Valid expiration 6 hours
test_steps:
Trigger JWT issuance.
Record the exact issuance time (iat claim).
Extract the 'exp' claim from the JWT.
Calculate the difference: exp - iat (in seconds).
Verify the difference is 21600 seconds (6 hours) within acceptable precision (e.g., ±5 seconds).
expected_result: JWT expiration time is exactly 6 hours from issuance (21600 seconds).

title: EP: Invalid signing algorithm (attempt with HS256)
precondition: System is configured to use RS256; test attempts to force HS256 by modifying JWT signing configuration.
test_steps:
Change system configuration to set JWT signing algorithm to HS256 (if possible).
Attempt to issue JWT.
If JWT is issued, decode header and check algorithm; otherwise verify issuance error.
test_data: JWT signing algorithm configuration changed to HS256.
expected_result: Either JWT issuance fails or the issued JWT still uses RS256.

title: EP: Valid signing algorithm RS256
test_steps:
Trigger JWT issuance through normal authentication flow.
Capture the issued JWT from response.
Decode the JWT header (base64url).
Verify the 'alg' claim equals 'RS256'.

title: DT: JWT not issued, no token or cookie
test_steps:
Provide invalid credentials to trigger authentication failure.
Check response headers and body for JWT token.
Check for Set-Cookie header.
expected_result: No JWT token is generated and no cookie related to JWT is set.

title: DT: JWT issued triggers all three actions
test_steps:
Trigger normal JWT issuance.
Verify JWT header algorithm is RS256.
Verify JWT expiration is 6h from now.
Verify cookie max-age differs from 6h.
expected_result: All three actions occur: RS256, exp 6h, cookie max-age different.
